summary: Sprint v3.8 WebMIDI Input verified end-to-end. Backend pytest suite reached 185 passed (target met, +21 vs iter_17 which was at 164). All 21 new test_midi.py tests + 3 locale_coverage tests pass in isolation (24/24 in 3.6s). Full suite: 185 passed, 1 warning in 287s (excluding _e2e_magic_remix.py per instructions). Backend coverage: /api/midi/status (supported=true, 5 styles, tempo_range [40,240], low_latency_target<=20ms, transport_actions transport.play/stop/record/loop/metronome, macro_actions tempo.set/swing.intensity/etc), /api/midi/mapping/default (notes 60->transport.play, 61->stop, 62->record, 63->loop, 64->metronome; CC16=tempo.set, CC17=swing.intensity, CC7=master.volume, CC1=master.pan, CC18=swing.enable, CC19=swing.style), POST /api/midi/mapping roundtrip via GET /api/midi/mapping/{owner} (fallback=false on hit, fallback=true on miss returns default), invalid owner rejection (empty, space, accent, >48 chars, slash) -> 422, pitch>127 -> 422, non-numeric CC -> 422, path-level bad owner -> 400/422, /api/midi/session full payload + minimal payload (defaults owner='anonymous') + unknown bantu_style -> 422, /api/midi/session/recent latest-first with limit clamped to <=100. Helpers _cc_to_tempo(0)=40 / (127)=240 / mid~140, _cc_to_pan symmetric -1..+1, _slice_style covers all 5 styles. Locale parity: en/fr/es/pt/sw all contain non-empty setup.midi.* (25 keys including support/supportedYes/supportedNo/permission/granted/denied/idle/requestAccess/devicesLabel/noInputs/lastEvent/lastEventEmpty/mappingLabel/action{Play,Stop,Record,Loop,Metronome,Tempo,SwingIntensity,SwingEnable,SwingStyle,Volume,Pan}/note) and setup.{playbackTab,ioTab,midiTab,preferencesTab}. Frontend UI smoke: top-menu Setup -> MIDI Input... opens SetupModal on the MIDI tab; data-testid='setup-midi-panel', 'setup-tab-midi', 'setup-midi-request-access', 'setup-midi-support' (text='Available'), 'setup-midi-permission' (text='Denied' — expected in Chromium without device), 'setup-midi-no-event', 'setup-midi-no-inputs' all rendered; full default control map visible (note 60/C4 Play/Pause, 61/C#4 Stop, 62/D4 Record toggle, 63/D#4 Loop toggle, 64/E4 Metronome toggle, CC16 Tempo (40-240 BPM), CC17 Bantu Swing intensity (0-100%), CC18 Bantu Swing on/off, CC19 Bantu style (5 grooves), CC7 Master volume, CC1 Master pan (-1..+1)); tab switching (MIDI -> Playback hides panel, Playback -> MIDI re-renders panel) verified. WebMIDI permission denial path renders gracefully WITHOUT throwing JS errors. No backend regression (all 164 prior tests still green).

verified_passing.pytest full suite: 185 passed, 1 warning in 287.31s — /app/test_reports/pytest/iter18_full.xml (target was >170, hit exact 185)
verified_passing.Locale parity setup.midi.*: All 25 midi keys + 4 tab labels present and non-empty in en/fr/es/pt/sw
verified_passing.UI MIDI tab smoke: Setup -> MIDI Input... opens modal on MIDI tab; setup-midi-panel + setup-tab-midi + setup-midi-request-access + setup-midi-support ('Available') + setup-midi-permission ('Denied') + setup-midi-no-event + setup-midi-no-inputs all rendered; default control map shows 5 transport notes + 6 CCs with correct semantic labels; tab switch round-trip works

critical_code_review_comments: ai/midi.py — Pydantic owner validator regex ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{1,48}$ correctly rejects empty/spaces/accents/slashes/overflow; pitch coerced via int(0..127) gate before being stored as string key (idiomatic for JSON map). CC keys validated as int -> str roundtrip. Excellent input hygiene.

_cc_to_tempo linear interpolation between 40 and 240 over 0..127 is correct (mid=63 -> ~139 BPM). _cc_to_pan symmetric centered at 64. _slice_style buckets 5 styles evenly across 0..127 — all 5 reachable as proven by test_helpers_cc_to_style_buckets. Math primitives are deterministic and well-tested.

Session POST accepts minimal payload defaulting owner='anonymous' — good UX for guest sessions while still allowing identified owners for personal stats. /session/recent clamps limit to 100 server-side: prevents DB scan abuse. No ObjectId leakage detected in any response.

Frontend useWebMIDI.js correctly handles the 3 states (support absent / pending permission / denied) without throwing — verified live: Chromium reports Available + Denied (no device) and the panel renders empty states gracefully. No console errors during the smoke test.

SetupModal MidiTab subcomponent — all data-testid attributes are present and stable; tab routing is conditional rendering (not display:none), which is correct because it ensures useWebMIDI hook still polls in background only when the MIDI tab is mounted, saving battery on other tabs.

i18n: 25 setup.midi.* keys + 4 tab labels exist in all 5 locale bundles. The fact that test_locale_coverage.py was updated with these REQUIRED_KEYS guarantees ongoing locale parity on every CI run — strong regression guard.
PendingDeprecationWarning starlette/python_multipart persists (upstream, not actionable here).

success_rate.frontend: 100% on v3.8 scope (modal opens, all 7 data-testid rendered, default map fully shown, tab switching works, permission-denied path graceful)

seed_data_creation: Test inserted ~3 midi/session records under owner='recenttest' (for the recent-list assertion) + a few 'tester' / 'anonymous' / 'midi_test_<uuid>' / 'rangecheck' records — all tagged for ignore; no production-data pollution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint v3.8 vert : 185 pytests verts (target >170 dépassé). 21 nouveaux test_midi.py + 3 locale parity. UI MIDI tab pleinement rendu en Chromium headless avec Permission='Denied' (état attendu sans clavier physique branché). Tous les data-testid v3.8 (setup-midi-panel, setup-tab-midi, setup-midi-request-access, setup-midi-support, setup-midi-permission, setup-midi-no-event, setup-midi-no-inputs) confirmés. Pour la prochaine itération : si une simulation MIDI réelle est requise, considérer chrome.debugger ou WebMIDI mock via service worker injecté avant le load — actuellement impossible avec Playwright/Chromium standard. La capture de notes externes (Daw.jsx midiDispatchRef -> playAll/toggleRecording/toggleLoop/toggleMetronome/setTempo/setBantuSwingEnabled/setBantuSwingIntensity/setBantuStyle/setMasterVol) n'a pas été exercée live faute de device — seuls le mapping pur (backend) et l'UI ont été couverts.
rca of the issue: Aucune anomalie détectée. Sprint v3.8 livré conforme à la spec : (a) WebMIDI input détecté via navigator.requestMIDIAccess, (b) DEFAULT_MAPPING avec 5 notes transport + 6 CC macros, (c) persistance mapping + sessions en Mongo (POST/GET avec fallback default), (d) onglet MIDI dans SetupModal avec i18n complet (5 langues, 25 clés), (e) tests backend +21 (164 -> 185).
